promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the prior A2-mid axis12 realization batch deferred this constraints family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: pair identity, local-surface-versus-V2 admission, local full metric surface versus descendant subset, same-hash seni divergence, asymmetric-pair axis2 orientation split, and the balanced-pair non-separation limit.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The adjacent axis12 A2-mid batch provides the local-suite-versus-descendant seam style, the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern, and the axis0 suite A2-mid batch provides a nearby full-surface-versus-compressed-descendant seam style.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it is the next residual pair and must stay outside this bounded axis12 constraints pass.
Not selected because it would erase the local-full-surface-versus-V2 seam and the paired-family boundary preserved by the parent batch.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent axis12 constraints batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable shell, descendant seam, local-vs-descendant surface split, same-hash divergence, asymmetric-pair orientation split, and balanced-pair limit without reopening raw sims files.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the axis12 constraints batch without reopening raw sims files.

They keep pair identity, descendant admission seam, local-vs-descendant surface split, same-hash divergence, asymmetric-pair orientation, and the balanced-pair non-separation limit distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain admission-overreads, surface-collapse overreads, same-hash identity overreads, asymmetric-class flattening, or balanced-pair over-resolution rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
